title: Senior Staff Software Engineer - Backend (10+ years of experience)
score_reasoning: Your distributed systems and microservices background align well with Outreach's cloud-native, service-oriented platform—the tech stack (Python/Go, AWS, Docker, observability) maps directly to the backend challenges described. However, the role is anchored to Hyderabad with in-office collaboration requirements, which is a hard location mismatch: you're based in Berlin, remote-first, and explicitly not open to on-site work outside your location. Even with 'remote-friendly' language, planned in-office time in Hyderabad makes this impractical for your setup. The seniority is also above your current level: Staff-level roles typically require 12+ years and broader organizational/systems architecture scope; you have 7 years of strong senior engineer experience, which is a real step below Staff. The growth opportunity is strong (high-scale systems, forecasting architecture), but the location barrier dominates.

red_flags: On-site anchor in Hyderabad conflicts with your Berlin-based, remote-first setup
Staff-level title requires 12+ years; you have 7 years (senior engineer level)
No Kubernetes mentioned, but cloud-native platform likely expects it
Significant timezone mismatch (Hyderabad UTC+5:30 vs Berlin UTC+1/+2; 4–5h gap)

description:
About Outreach

Outreach, founded in 2014, is the only complete agentic AI platform for revenue teams. Outreach infuses agentic AI, conversation intelligence, and assistive AI to power hundreds of use cases across revenue motions. From new logo prospecting to expansions, deal acceleration, driving retention, and forecasting, Outreach AI automates workflows and frees sellers to focus on more strategic conversations and actions. Revenue leaders benefit from connected account visibility, performance insights, and higher forecasting accuracy across every GTM team. World leading enterprise organizations use Outreach to power their revenue teams, including Databricks, SAP, Siemens, and Verizon to name a few. 

About the Team

The mission of the Commit Backend team is to build and scale the distributed platform that powers Outreach’s forecasting and opportunity management systems. From opportunity lifecycle management and forecasting rollups to goal tracking. Our services directly impact revenue predictability and customer trust. 
We operate in a cloud-native, service-oriented architecture at scale. The problems are complex, the expectations are high, and the impact is real. 

The Role

We are hiring a Senior Staff Software Engineer, driving architectural direction, leading cross-team initiatives, and ensuring predictable delivery of high-impact programs. 
This role requires deep technical expertise combined with strong cross-functional leadership. You will create clarity in ambiguous environments, proactively remove blockers, and consistently drive initiatives to a measurable path to green. 
Location: Remote-friendly, with planned in-office collaborations in Hyderabad.
